commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Vessel. Like Gideon, when he attacked Madian, ver. 26., and Judges vii. 19. Septuagint, "the nobles. "(Haydock)
Hebrew, "their beauty. "The empire of Assyria shall presently fall. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: And who are these but the rich? Because they have indeed received their consolation, glory and honor, and a lofty position from their wealth. - "Against Marcion 4.15"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
